scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix warehouse
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,warehouse -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix warehouse"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix warehouse
